name: Crunchy Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound uncooked shrimp, cut up, shelled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a food processor, finely chop all meatball ingredients (do not over-pulse to pureed state).
3. Shape the mixture into 36 meatballs, each about 1 inch in diameter.
4. Place the meatballs on a broiler pan and bake for 18 minutes, or until slightly browned. Keep warm in a chafing dish.
5. Prepare the dipping sauce by pulsing all ingredients together several times.
6. Serve with meatballs and toothpicks. Makes about 1 cup of sauce.
